copy.on_your_turn_the_dice_are_rolled_ov2_als: On your turn the dice are rolled (OV2 also auto-opens a roll animation), then pick which piece to move.
copy.only_a_6_gets_a_piece_out_of_the_yard_on: Only a 6 gets a piece out of the yard onto the path.
copy.a_6_a_capture_or_entering_home_from_the_: A 6, a capture, or entering home from the path — per engine rules — grants an extra turn.
copy.a_piece_that_reaches_home_finishes_four_: A piece that reaches home finishes; four pieces home wins.
